cases.title: System automatically assigns Registered when seats remain available
preconditions: Event is RegistrationOpen with configured capacity greater than current Registered count
Registration window is active per BR-02
Participant has no active registration for the event
steps: Invoke registrationService.register(eventId, participantId, actorContext)
Read returned registration entity state and waitlistPosition
cases.expected: System assigns state Registered automatically without organizer intervention; waitlistPosition is null; Registered seat-holder count increments by one; testing-plan §3 row Register with available seat → Registered satisfied

cases.title: POST registrations returns Registered when event has available capacity
preconditions: Published event with registration opened, capacity 5, zero Registered participants
Valid participant JWT
Fresh Idempotency-Key header
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registration-status for the same participant
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with state Registered, reasonCode null, registrationId, eventId, and participantId; GET registration-status reflects the same Registered assignment; system auto-statusing per FR-07

cases.title: Capacity guard selects Registered when registeredCount is strictly less than capacity
preconditions: Pure capacity decision inputs: registeredCount, capacity, waitlistEnabled
steps: Evaluate capacity decision for registeredCount=0, capacity=5, waitlistEnabled=true
Evaluate for registeredCount=4, capacity=5, waitlistEnabled=false
Evaluate for registeredCount=2, capacity=10, waitlistEnabled=true
cases.expected: Each evaluation returns Registered outcome; system routes to seat assignment not waitlist or rejection when seats remain; aligns with testing plan unit target capacity guard validator

cases.title: acceptRegistration state transition guard permits Registered when seat available
preconditions: Registration in Requested state
Registration window open, no duplicate active registration, registeredCount less than capacity
steps: Call acceptRegistration transition guard with preconditions above
Verify guard returns permitted transition to Registered
cases.expected: Guard permits Requested to Registered transition; guard requires window open + no duplicate + seat available per state machine transition table

cases.title: acceptRegistration transition persists Registered state and records transition
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with available seats
New registration request passes auth, window, and dedupe checks
steps: Execute acceptRegistration via registration module pipeline
Query registration row state and optional status history
cases.expected: Registration row persisted with state Registered; transition from Requested to Registered recorded; system outcome matches Workflow B step 3 Registered if seat available

cases.title: Participant UI reflects system-assigned Registered status after registration
preconditions: Event detail page shows open registration with available seats
Participant logged in with no existing registration for the event
steps: Navigate to event detail and initiate registration via UI
Observe registration status panel or badge after action completes
cases.expected: UI displays Registered status (positive confirmation per common UI components) reflecting system auto-assignment; no manual organizer approval step required

cases.title: Last available seat triggers Registered assignment filling capacity exactly
preconditions: Event capacity N with exactly N-1 participants in Registered state
Event RegistrationOpen with active registration window
New participant with no active registration
steps: Register one additional participant via registrationService.register
Query count of Registered participants for the event
cases.expected: System assigns Registered to the new participant; total Registered count equals EventCapacity exactly (N); FR-07 applies at capacity boundary when one seat remains

cases.title: Concurrent registrations with available seats assign Registered up to remaining capacity
preconditions: Event capacity 5 with zero Registered participants
Eight distinct participantIds with no prior registration
Parallel registrationService.register calls fired simultaneously
steps: Execute Promise.allSettled on all concurrent register calls
Count registrations with state Registered versus Waitlisted
cases.expected: Exactly five registrations receive Registered from system auto-assignment; remaining three receive Waitlisted per FR-08; no more than capacity assigned Registered under contention

cases.title: Available seats with waitlist enabled still assigns Registered not Waitlisted
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with capacity 10 and 3 Registered participants
waitlistEnabled true
New participant with no active registration
steps: Register participant via registrationService.register
Inspect returned state and waitlistPosition
cases.expected: System assigns Registered because seats are available; participant is not Waitlisted; waitlist path applies only when full per BR-04 not FR-07

cases.title: Registration outside window does not assign Registered despite available seats
preconditions: Event has available seats (Registered count below capacity)
Current time is before registrationOpenAt or after registrationCloseAt via fixed clock
Participant has no active registration
steps: Attempt registrationService.register for the participant
Observe error and absence of Registered assignment
cases.expected: Registration rejected with REGISTRATION_WINDOW_CLOSED; no Registered state assigned; FR-07 precondition (valid registration request) not met when window closed

cases.title: New registrant receives Registered after cancellation frees an available seat
preconditions: Event at capacity with one Registered participant who cancels before deadline
Cancellation completes freeing one seat
Different new participant with no prior registration (not waitlist promotion path)
steps: Complete valid cancellation to release seat
Register new participant via registrationService.register
Verify state of new registration
cases.expected: New participant registration is automatically assigned Registered; seat consumption reflects freed capacity; distinct from FR-12 waitlist promotion which handles existing Waitlisted rows

cases.title: Capacity 1 event assigns exactly one Registered participant automatically
preconditions: Event capacity 1, RegistrationOpen, waitlistEnabled true
Three distinct participants with no prior registration
steps: Register first participant and verify state
Attempt registration for second and third participants
Query Registered count
cases.expected: First participant receives Registered from system; subsequent participants do not receive Registered; exactly one Registered row exists; FR-07 applies only while the single seat is available

cases.title: Registered assignment executes atomically within capacity guard transaction
preconditions: Event with capacity 5 and available seats
Registration module uses BEGIN/COMMIT with row lock on event rule config
steps: Complete successful registration that system assigns Registered
Verify transaction wraps insert, in-transaction registered count, and commit
cases.expected: Registered assignment and capacity check commit atomically; no intermediate state where Registered count exceeds capacity; aligns with database design transactional seat assignment guardrails

cases.title: Capacity decision in validation pipeline assigns Registered before persist
preconditions: Registration request passes auth, event state, window, and dedupe checks
registeredCount less than capacity
steps: Trace registration pipeline steps 4 (capacity decision) and 5 (assign state and persist)
Confirm state chosen before database write
cases.expected: Pipeline step 4 selects Registered outcome; step 5 persists Registered state transactionally; system auto-assignment is deterministic per validation pipeline registration request flow

cases.title: Registered assignment requires no organizer manual approval or intervention
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with available seats
Only Participant actor initiates registration; no Organizer Admin or Staff action
steps: Participant invokes registrationService.register without any prior organizer seat assignment
Verify registration state and audit that no manual override was required
cases.expected: System actor automatically assigns Registered per FR-07 functional requirement format (Actor: System); participant registration succeeds without organizer workflow step

cases.title: Flow A register step yields system-assigned Registered status
preconditions: E2E fixture: draft event created with capacity 5
Organizer transitions event through publish and open-registration
Fresh participant token and idempotency key
steps: Execute Flow A step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations after open-registration
Verify response state before proceeding to check-in steps
cases.expected: Registration response state is Registered assigned automatically by system; enables subsequent check-in, feedback, and eligibility steps; core scenario matrix Register with available seat maps to Registered

cases.title: POST rejected when event not RegistrationOpen despite available seats
preconditions: Event is Published but registration not yet opened, or registration is closed
Capacity has available seats by count
Authenticated participant with no active registration
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations while event state disallows registration intake
cases.expected: HTTP 409 or 422 with typed error; response body state is not Registered; system does not auto-assign Registered when registration intake is blocked

cases.title: State transition guard rejects acceptRegistration when no seat available
preconditions: registeredCount equals capacity
Registration otherwise valid (window open, no duplicate)
steps: Call acceptRegistration transition guard when registeredCount >= capacity
Verify guard denies Registered transition
cases.expected: Guard rejects Requested to Registered transition; routes to waitlist or rejection path instead; confirms FR-07 seat-available precondition is enforced at state machine layer

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin and OrganizerStaff denied POST registrations — no Registered assignment
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with available seats
Valid JWT for OrganizerAdmin (or OrganizerStaff scoped to the event)
Actor has no participant registration for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with OrganizerAdmin bearer token and Idempotency-Key
Repeat POST with OrganizerStaff bearer token for the same event
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 unauthorized; no registration row created and no Registered state assigned; Register for event capability is Participant-only per roles-permissions matrix
